title: PE Class Warm-up 体育课热身
scene: Teacher带领学生们在体育课前做热身运动。

lines.en: Class, line up! It is time for PE.
lines.zh: 同学们，排队！体育课时间到了。

lines.en: Teacher, can I go get some water first?
lines.zh: 老师，我能先去喝点水吗？

lines.en: After warm-up, OK? Now let us stretch.
lines.zh: 热身后好吗？现在我们做拉伸。

lines.en: OK. What should we do first?
Raise your arms up and stretch to the left.
Yes, perfect! Now stretch to the right.
This feels good. I was stiff from sitting all day.
lines.zh: 感觉很舒服。坐了一整天身体都僵了。

lines.en: Now let us do ten jumping jacks.
lines.zh: 现在我们做十个开合跳。

lines.en: One, two, three... I feel warm already!
lines.zh: 一、二、三……我已经觉得热了！
